title: Decision 6 — Obsidian-compatible markdown for the memory surface
summary: Decision to keep nanoclaw's per-group markdown folders as the Obsidian vault directly, using PARA layout and plain GFM with no sync layer.
scope: PARA folders (projects, areas, resources, archive, conversations)
notes: Filename convention (numbered decision under decisions/) and content (single decision + 'What this decision does NOT include' scope-limit) match ADR pattern. No explicit `Status:` field, so locked=false per rule (only Accepted counts as locked).
